description: Testing rejected pattern storage and safe negative scoring across 3 files in Next.js application
test_approach: Node.js unit tests with mocked database layer testing pure logic

tests: logChange with result='discarded' and userTask.length > 10 calls addRejectedPatternToMemory
logChange with result='discarded' and short task does NOT store rejected pattern
logChange with result='applied' only stores positive pattern (existing behavior unchanged)
addRejectedPatternToMemory with new rejected task creates entry with reject_count: 1
addRejectedPatternToMemory with existing rejected entry increments reject_count and usage_count
matchPromptPattern with no rejected patterns has same scoring as before (no regression)
matchPromptPattern with weak rejected pattern still allows positive match
matchPromptPattern with strong rejected pattern but stronger positive still matches
matchPromptPattern with rejected pattern that drops score below 0.5 returns ambiguous_match or null
matchPromptPattern with high reject_count has penalty scaled up (capped at 0.35)
Stale filter still works: success_count=0 and usage>3 gets skipped
Usage boost still works: patterns with higher usage_count get boosted
Verify logChange import and call for discard_pending_diff exists in route.js

key_findings.rejected_pattern_storage: ✅ Successfully stores rejected patterns when result='discarded' and userTask.length > 10
key_findings.pattern_increment: ✅ Correctly increments reject_count and usage_count for repeated rejections
key_findings.negative_scoring: ✅ Safe negative scoring implemented with penalty calculation: min(0.35, sim * 0.3 * min(reject_count, 3))
key_findings.scoring_preserved: ✅ Existing positive scoring logic preserved (no regression)
key_findings.decision_logic: ✅ Decision behavior working: strong positive + weak negative → match, penalty drops below threshold → ambiguous/null
key_findings.route_integration: ✅ Route.js properly wires discard event to logChange function for fire-and-forget learning

change_log_module.addRejectedPatternToMemory_function: ✅ Creates/updates rejected_prompt_pattern: entries with proper metadata
change_log_module.existing_behavior: ✅ Positive pattern storage unchanged for result='applied'

prompt_library_module.matchPromptPattern_enhancement: ✅ Computes rejected-pattern penalties and applies to candidate scores
prompt_library_module.decision_behavior: ✅ Returns ambiguous_match or null when penalty affects scoring

route_integration.parameters: ✅ projectId, chatId, userId, userTask, taskMode: 'discard', result: 'discarded'

database_context: ✅ Tests properly mock Supabase PostgreSQL db methods (projectMemory, changelog)
test_methodology: ✅ CommonJS module mocking, pure logic testing, no database dependencies
completion_status: ✅ All Phase 4 Correction Learning features implemented and tested successfully
